arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Kvaratskhelia CONFIRMATION, Man Utd TRUTH, Chelsea TRIO out
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including news on Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Marcus Rashford and Omar Marmoush. Speaking on his YouTube channel, the Italian transfer expert has announced that Khvicha Kvaratskhelia is close to joining PSG after Antonio Conte confirmed that the player has asked to leave.

arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has made a decision on his future at Napoli, reveals Antonio Conte amid transfer interest from Liverpool and Man United
arts.sum: In the years since the triumph he has remained a key player at the Stadio Armando Maradona and has netted five goals and contributed three assists this season.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Verona: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season unfolds, Napoli are set to host Hellas Verona at the iconic Stadio Diego Armando Maradona this Sunday evening. Currently riding a wave of momentum with four consecutive victories, Napoli will be aiming to solidify their position at the top of the league and continue their pursuit of the Scudetto.
